Main prompt:
Create a professional editorial cover image (16:9) for: “In China Employee Termination (2026): A Position-First Operating Paper for Foreign Employers.” Show a multinational HR, legal, payroll, and finance team in a modern office reviewing a risk-boundary dashboard with labeled zones: Clear / Conditional / Contested. Style should be analytical, trust-oriented, and globally understandable. No flags or political symbols. Focus on governance, evidence, and decision discipline.

Variant A (clean isometric):
Isometric office control room, modular workflow cards, soft blue palette, clear typography blocks, high readability.

Variant B (realistic office photography style):
Natural light meeting room, diverse professionals, laptop showing compliance matrix, documentary realism.

Variant C (modern flat illustration):
Flat vector style, layered cards and flow lines, minimal gradients, enterprise editorial look.

Recommended aspect ratio: 16:9 (2400x1350)
Negative prompt: propaganda visuals, courtroom drama clichés, handcuffs, police imagery, low-resolution text, clutter.
Suggested alt text: Cross-functional HR, legal, payroll, and finance team reviewing a China employee termination risk-boundary framework.
